info: Starting in the summer after my freshman year, I learned how to program through Harvard’s online CS50 programming course and numerous YouTube tutorials and documentation guides, building my skills through trial and error.
title: Self Reliance
Creativity
info: I  am familiar with various programming languages, frameworks, and libraries, and am always looking for ways to grow my skillset. I love to work with different themes, styles, and looks for my various projects, creating the perfect blend of visually appealing and informative content.

title: Problem Solving
info: I fix problems in my community. Whether it’s building PathFinders, a website that brings internships, scholarships, and opportunities closer to high school students, or internal tools for the city of Cambridge, MA that support mental health resources for city residents, I am always looking for creative ways to make a positive change.
